funcbody:
func Wrap(b []byte, pid uint64) string {
	buf := bufferpool.GetBuffer()
	defer bufferpool.PutBuffer(buf)
	buf.Write(prefix)
	buf.WriteString(" pid=")
	buf.WriteString(strconv.FormatUint(pid, 10))
	buf.Write(endDelim)
	buf.WriteByte('\n')
	buf.Write(b)
	buf.Write(prefix)
	buf.Write(closingDelimAndNewline)
	return buf.String()
}
